title: Kubernetes API Server Bypass Risks — Mitigations
text:
Restrict access to sub-resources of the
nodes
API object using mechanisms such as
RBAC
. Only grant this access when required,
such as by monitoring services.
Avoid granting the
nodes/proxy
catch-all permission, even with just the
get
verb.
Instead, grant
granular permissions
.
Restrict access to the kubelet port. Only allow specified and trusted IP address
ranges to access the port.
Ensure that
kubelet authentication
.
is set to webhook or certificate mode.
Ensure that the unauthenticated "read-only" Kubelet port is not enabled on the cluster.
